input.class: w-full h-full bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-900 truncate max-w-40 p-1

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2rem minmax(12rem, 1fr) repeat({@cols.length}, minmax(9rem, 1fr));

div.class: grid grid-cols-subgrid gap-0 col-span-full col-row-full order-1
sticky top-0 grid grid-cols-subgrid gap-0 col-span-full order-0
p-2 snap-start sticky left-0 z-50 bg-gray-300 dark:bg-gray-700 flex items-start p-2 justify-center
border p-2 max-w-64 snap-start sticky z-50 left-8 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-800
border p-2 max-w-40 snap-start p-2 top-0 z-20 bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-800
border border-dotted border-gray-400 sticky left-0 bg-gray-300 dark:bg-gray-700 snap-start flex items-start p-2 justify-center
border border-dotted px-2 py-1 border-gray-400 sticky left-8 snap-start bg-gray-300 dark:bg-gray-700 line-clamp-4
border border-dotted border-gray-300 snap-start p-0 overflow-hidden line-clamp-4
div.title: @data| dot:@col.id
